title: Wings BattleFest
wikitext:
{{DISPLAYTITLE: Wings BattleFest}} {{Infobox league |game=bgmi |liquipediatier=4 |name=Wings BattleFest |tickername=Wings BattleFest |shortname=Wings BattleFest |image=Wings BattleFest lightmode.png |type=Online |team_number=18 |series=Wings BattleFest |organizer=Upthrust Esports |organizer-link=https://www.instagram.com/p/CShJWviBGmC/ |sponsor=[https://www.instagram.com/wingslifestyle/ Wings Lifestyle] |mode=squads |prizepoolusd= |perspective=tpp |localcurrency=inr |prizepool=2,00,000 |country=India |sdate=2021-10-01 |edate=2021-10-02 |twitter= |instagram=wingslifestyle |web= |discord=zZQMMPeEj7 |facebook= |youtube=channel/UCVgjmM9ByKkMf-iYd1YRSZg }} '''[https://www.instagram.com/wingslifestyle/ Wings Lifestyle]''' in association with '''[https://www.instagram.com/upthrust_esports/ Upthrust Esports]''' present a Invitational BGMI tournament called the '''Wings BattleFest''' with a total prize pool of ₹2,00,000 {{Abbr/INR}}. ==About== ===Broadcast Talent=== {{box|start|padding=1em}} {{broadcasterCard |position= Hindi Commentator |lang=in |b1=Spero |b2=Mayavi }} {{box|end}} ===Format=== '''''Wings BattleFest:''' 27th September 2021 to 2nd October 2021.'' Maps: {{Abbr/TPP}} [[Erangel]], [[Miramar]], and [[Sanhok]]. * '''''Semi-Finals''': 27th September to 29th September, 2021.'' ** ''27 Invited teams will be divided into 3 groups (A,B,&,C)'' ** '' Teams will battle in a round-robin format'' ** ''Each group will play a total of 6 matches'' ** ''9 matches to be played over a period of 3 days. ** {{bgcolortext|up|''Top 16 teams}} from the overall standings will advance to Grand Finals''.
*'''''Grand Finals''': 1st October to 2nd October, 2021.'' ** ''18 Qualified teams from the Semi-Finals will play in the Grand Finals''. ** ''10 Matches to be played over a period of 2 days'' ** ''5 Matches to be played each day'' ====Grand Finals Matchdays==== * ''2 Matchdays: 4 Matches Each Day.'' ** '''''Map Rotation''''': ''E>>M>>S>>E ====Points Distribution==== {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;" ! colspan="2"|Points Distribution |- |'''''Kill Points''''' ||''1 per kill'' |- !width=100px|Place !width=100px|Points |- |{{Placement|1}}||15 |- |{{Placement|2}}||12 |-
